basic_details.job_title: FRI Dehradun Group C Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 91 Forest Guard, LDC and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: FRI Dehradun Group C Recruitment 2026 notification is out to fill 91 new vacancies across Uttarakhand. Candidates with Any Graduate, ITI, 12TH, 10TH Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 04-05-2026, and closes on 03-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through FRI Dehradun website, fri.icfre.gov.in/.
basic_details.organization_name: Forest Research Institute (FRI), Indian Council of Forestry Research and Education (ICFRE), P.O. New Forest, Dehradun - 248006 (Uttarakhand)

salary_details.pay_scale: 7th CPC Pay Level-1 to Level-6 (as per post)

selection_process: Stage-I: Computer Based Test (CBT) + Stage-II: Descriptive Test + Stage-III: Skill/Trade Test (for specific posts)
how_to_apply: Online submission of application can only be made from the link provided on the official FRI website at https://fri.icfre.gov.in. Candidates should read the instructions carefully before filling up the online application form. No other mode of application will be accepted. Candidates who desire to apply for more than one post should apply online separately for each post. However, FRI will not be responsible if candidates get the exam centre at long distances or on the same date/time.

basic_details.job_title: Indian Army TGC 144 Entry Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 30 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Indian Army Recruitment 2026: 30 vacancies for TGC 144 Entry. Apply online from 13 May to 11 June 2026 at joinindianarmy.nic.in.
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Army, Directorate General of Recruiting, Integrated HQ, Ministry of Defence (Army)

age_limit.age_details: Group Testing Officer tests and Interview by Interviewing Officer. Only those clearing Stage I proceed to Stage II.

salary_details.pay_scale: Level 10: Rs. 56,100–1,77,500/- ; CTC approx. Rs. 17–18 Lakh per annum

selection_process: Application > Shortlisting > SSB > Medical > Merit List > Joining Letter
Two weeks in June 2026 (first come first serve basis)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the official Indian Army Recruiting website www.joinindianarmy.nic.in. Click on ‘Officer Entry Apply/Login’ and then click ‘Registration’ (registration not required if already registered). Fill the online registration form after reading the instructions carefully. After registering, click on ‘Apply Online’ under Dashboard, then click ‘Apply’ shown against Technical Graduate Course. The online portal will be active from 13-05-2026 (1500 hrs) to 11-06-2026 (1500 hrs). Aadhaar number and Matriculation certificate are mandatory for registration.

basic_details.post_name: Homeguard Volunteer – Male Home Guard Volunteer
basic_details.organization_name: Uttarakhand Homeguards & Civil Security Department, Dehradun

salary_details.pay_scale: Daily Duty Allowance as fixed by Govt. + Dearness Allowance + Washing Allowance

selection_process: Physical Measurement → Physical Efficiency Test (30 marks) → Merit List (60 marks total) + Medical Exam
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted offline only - either in person or by post - on the prescribed form. The form is available on the Facebook page Uttarakhand Home Guards and from the office notice board, Nanda Ki Chowki, Chakrata Road, Dehradun. Hard copy applications duly filled must be submitted to the office on any working day from 01.05.2026 to 22.05.2026 (by 11:59 PM).

basic_details.post_name: Pashudhan Prasar Adhikari (Livestock Extension Officer), Group-C
basic_details.organization_name: Departmental employees who have completed 5 years of continuous service from the date of recruitment AND have passed Intermediate (10+2) with Biology or Agriculture from Uttarakhand Board of Secondary Education, Uttarakhand Board of University Education, or UP Board of Secondary Education, or any equivalent exam recognised by the Government.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the UKSSSC portal www.sssc.uk.gov.in. No manual or postal applications will be accepted. The online portal will be active from 13 May 2026 to 02 June 2026. A correction window will be available from 05 June 2026 to 07 June 2026.

basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Rishikesh Project Research Scientist II Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Rishikesh (AIIMS Rishikesh) Project Research Scientist II (Medical) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for 1 Project Research Scientist – II (Medical) post for eligible BAMS candidates with required post-qualification experience, with the online application window open till 25 May 2026 on the official AIIMS Rishikesh website.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Rishikesh to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.
